title: hieracium benzianum subsp. pseudobenzianum
intro: Hieracium benzianum subsp. pseudobenzianum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium benzianum subsp. pseudobenzianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Hieracium benzianum subsp. pseudobenzianum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
